Preparation Tips for Your Video Consultation: What to Have Ready: What to Expect During the Visit:

  

•

  

Test your camera and microphone before the appointment Your medical history and any previous test reports Doctor will arrive within the scheduled time window

•

  

Ensure you have a stable internet connection (WiFi recommended) List of current medications and allergies Please have a clean, well-lit room ready for examination

•

  

Find a quiet, well-lit space for the consultation Symptoms description and when they started The consultation will last approximately 30-45 minutes

•

  

Keep your medical records and test results ready Questions you want to ask the doctor Doctor will bring necessary medical equipment

•

  

Have a list of medications you're currently taking Insurance information (if applicable) You'll receive prescriptions and recommendations after examination

•

  

Prepare any questions you want to ask the doctor

  
  
  

Important Reminders: Please Keep Ready:

  

•

  

Ensure your phone is fully charged and has good network signal All previous medical reports and test results

•

  

Keep your phone off silent mode and volume at an audible level Current medications list and prescription bottles

•

  

Be in a quiet environment to hear the doctor clearly Health insurance card (if applicable)

•

  

Have a pen and paper ready to take notes List of symptoms and questions for the doctor

•

  

If you miss the call, the doctor may call again or you can call back Clean towels and water for doctor's use

•

  

Family member available to assist if needed

  

If you have any questions or concerns regarding this activity, please contact your clinic directly or email us at support@sendscript.com

  

Please be assured that your privacy and security remain our highest priority.

  

Warm regards,
